codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the intended demo→real one-shot sessionStorage handoff and includes strong unit coverage for helper primitives plus provider hydration paths. I found one non-blocking regression risk in runtime polling lifecycle after bridge hydration.

issues.description: `bridgeHydrated` is set to true when a bridge snapshot is applied but is never reset. The refresh-loop effect exits early when `bridgeHydrated && !runtimeRef.current` and only re-runs on `[refreshRuntime, bridgeHydrated]` changes; if a real runtime is later created in the same SPA session, `runtimeRef.current` changes alone do not retrigger the effect, so periodic polling can remain disabled.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned `ui-builder` skill is heavily screen/Paper-oriented and does not map cleanly to state-management features like this bridge; the worker necessarily bypassed most UI-specific procedure steps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-builder/SKILL.md:12 limits scope to screen/route/UI work; :47-49 mandates TDD per new screen component, while this feature changed src/app/AppState.tsx and added src/app/__tests__/appStateBridge.test.tsx.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission testing convention text is too narrow for non-screen features; it implies tests live under screen tests only.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/78b31ed8-f90b-4b78-a67f-c8ed021439db/AGENTS.md:53 states tests are under `src/screens/__tests__/`, but this feature correctly added state tests at src/app/__tests__/appStateBridge.test.tsx.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture notes are now stale relative to the new bridge behavior and conditional polling path in AppStateProvider.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:33 and :112 describe IndexedDB-on-mount loading and fixed interval polling; new code adds sessionStorage/event hydration and conditional interval skip in src/app/AppState.tsx:82-110 and :330-340 plus bridge helpers in src/app/appStateBridge.ts.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 51ccdb8 for demo-to-real-app-state-bridge. Implementation is functionally aligned with expected behavior and well-tested; review passes with one non-blocking runtime polling lifecycle issue and three shared-state documentation/skill observations.
